configuration.tools: Read the exact runtime and assigned worker fixture; write only the assigned capture. All tracker, Git, worktree, remote, publication, installation, and destructive operations remained simulated.
unavailable_telemetry: Exact backend build and sampling seed were not exposed.
Token counts and latency were not exposed.
Workers did not echo model and reasoning identities; dispatch records supply the fixed configuration.

A.worst: A-01, A-02, and A-03 each satisfied 8/8 criteria.

B.worst: B-02 satisfied 6/8 criteria; it deferred the ordinary/high-risk review route and blocked F1 Repair.
B.decision_changing_variance: B-01 selected the ordinary review owner while B-02 deferred for target-type evidence. Both independently failed the F1-only Repair criterion.

systematic_failure.observed: Both B samples refused to admit F1 while F2 remained decision-required, preserving the Repair budget until F2 was resolved.
systematic_failure.required: Admit only F1 to the bounded Repair generation while F2 returns through the decision-required branch and F3 remains advisory.
systematic_failure.deterministic_trace: run_ledger.py requires every blocking finding to be automatic-in-scope and requires finding_ids to equal every blocker, so exact K-02 helper compatibility rejects an F1-only plan when F2 is also blocking.
systematic_failure.classification: frozen M0 and compatibility construction contradiction

protected_behavior.compatibility: K-01 through K-08 passed deterministic identity and helper checks, but unchanged K-02 behavior conflicts with M0-14.
protected_behavior.relationships: All eight relationships passed deterministic ownership traces; behavioral review-owner selection varied in B-02.

samples.note: Withheld D dispatch until C's dependency overlay existed; this did not change any registered criterion or landing safety.

samples.failure: Blocked F1 Repair until F2 was resolved instead of admitting only F1.
Deferred review-owner selection and blocked F1 Repair until F2 was resolved.

h1_contribution.claim: none; H1 is byte-identical to M0

current_only_dispositions.runtime_owned_push: rejected from M0 as owned elsewhere; no sampled regression observed
current_only_dispositions.same_actor_once_limit: rejected from M0 in favor of state-and-authority continuation; no sampled regression observed
current_only_dispositions.promotion_effect: neither disposition establishes V1 because M0 viability failed

v1.reason: Exact M0 failed protected behavioral viability; H1 is identical and cannot repair the baseline.

proof.diff_checks: git diff --check and git diff --cached --check passed

residual_transfer_gaps: Fixtures simulate provider and Git observations; no live tracker, connector partial failure, remote publication, or irreversible closeout ran.
Worktree containment does not establish process, credential, network, cache, submodule, or scarce-resource isolation.
Results remain bounded to the frozen bytes, fixtures, model, host, reasoning configuration, tools, and five samples.
